calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Off Calendar

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Feb-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen for Wayne Hodges.
Paul Melbostad and Ashley Klein for Tim Falkowski (Trustee).
Michael Zitani from Tenderloin Housing Clinic for Wayne Hodges in the Ellis Act matter.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not the Ellis Act matter needs to be kept separate from this petition, whether or not the Ellis Act matter is live at this point, whether it is expedient to resolve everything all at once, etc. The Parties were ordered to step out of the courtroom to see if they could come to some sort of an agreement. Upon returning, Ms. Klein reported that they were unable to reach an agreement on mediation. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision, etc. is continued to February 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an evidentiary hearing. All trial briefs, exhibit lists and witness lists are to be filed by February 15, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen appeared by telephone for Wayne Hodges.
Paul Melbostad for Timothy Falkowski.

Mr. Melbostad stated that his Client is willing to go to mediation in both the trust and the eviction matters. Mr. Rowen spoke of his Client's medical condition, stated that his Client is now available and agreeable to mediation, and that his Client needs an Attorney to address the issue of the Ellis Act. Mr. Rowen also stated that his Client is working on obtaining an Attorney, that he can only represent his Client in the probate matter and that he thinks his Client can have someone in place in a week or so. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 16, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 18, 2019. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen for Wayne Hodges (Petitioner).
Paul Melbostad and Ashley Klein for Tim Falkowski (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they had reached a settlement, that they had been negotiating Mr. Hodges doing a buyout, that three settlement options were presented, and that dismissing the lawsuits and each party bearing their own costs was selected, but they were unable to agree on the terms of the release and whether or not the settlement should or should not include the Ellis Act issue. The Court spoke with separate Counsel in chambers. The matter was recalled. The Court stated that this case cries out for mediation and needs global resolution, that the Parties need someone to negotiate the Ellis Act issue, noted that Mr. Rowen's Client is scheduled for a medical procedure, and stated that it will continue the matter for 30-days and it will then set a trial date and mediation dates. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision, etc. is continued to November 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to discuss the matter.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Appearance Required For Status Report On Settlement Discussions Re: Evidentiary Hearing For Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provisions, Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen for Wayne Hodges (Petitioner).
Paul Melbostad for Timothy Falkowski (Respondent).

Mr. Rowen stated that he spoke with Mr. Melbostad yesterday, that he made Mr. Melbostad an offer, that there are two ways (Mr. Hodges buy the property or pay Mr. Hodges to move) to settle this and that he did not hear back. Mr. Melbostad stated that he spoke with his Client, that his Client is not interested in negotiating a sale to Mr. Hodges, and that he is ready to go to trial on August 10th. Mr. Rowen stated that he is on another trial on the 10th and that Mr. Hodges is out of town until August 13th. The Court stated that it will not continue the hearing on the 10th, that it already took the scheduled hearing of August 3rd off calendar on the premise that the parties were working towards settlement, that Mr. Rowen is to be here, and that he is to file his trial brief, his witness list and his exhibit list. Status on settlement discussions is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Continued To Aug-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Continued To Aug-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Jul-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen appeared by telephone for Wayne Hodges (Petitioner).
Paul Melbostad for Timothy Falkowski (Trustee).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he is not aware of any evidence to support the allegations in the petition and that he does not agree to setting the matter for mediation. Mr. Rowen stated that he does not agree with Mr. Melbostad, that they are ready, willing and able to go to mediation, that he will need to do discovery and requested 90-days. Counsel stated that there will be no more than three to four witnesses total. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision, etc. is set for trial on July 27, 2018 and August 3, 2018 (two half days), at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Parties are to file trial briefs, witness lists and exhibit lists one week prior to the trial date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct Respondent Not To Use Trust Funds For Defense
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
